rationale: Educ. Code §29.155 governs kindergarten/prekindergarten grants from appropriated funds. It does not reference Tax Code §11.13(b) or homestead exemption amounts, so no direct statutory conflict arises.
quote: From amounts appropriated for the purposes of this section, the commissioner may make grants to school districts and open-enrollment charter schools to implement or expand kindergarten and prekindergarten programs
_note: No direct textual conflict. Indirect fiscal impact on school district revenue is possible but not a statutory inconsistency.
